Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about our digital photo booth service

How does a digital photo booth work?

Our digital photo booth uses high-quality webcams and software to capture photos. Guests can take pictures, customize them with filters and frames, and instantly share or print their creations.

Can I customize the photo templates for my event?

Absolutely! Digibooth Dietherdave offers extensive customization options. You can add your event logo, choose specific color schemes, and select templates that match your event theme.

How long does it take to set up?

Setup typically takes 30-45 minutes. Our team will arrive at least 1 hour before your event to ensure everything is working perfectly.

Do you provide props?

Yes, we offer both physical props and digital stickers/overlays to make the photo experience more fun and engaging for your guests.

Can guests share photos directly to social media?

Yes! Our digital platform allows instant sharing to all major social media platforms, as well as email and text message options.

İdeal Photo processes all images locally on your device. We respect your privacy and do not store any personal photos. All K-pop idol images are used for fan appreciation purposes only.
